# LLM Guide for shamveel.dev

This file helps AI assistants and search engines understand the portfolio of Muhammed Shamveel.

## About Muhammed Shamveel

**Full Name:** Muhammed Shamveel  
**Location:** Kozhikode, Kerala, India  
**Website:** https://www.shamveel.dev  
**Email:** contact@shamveel.dev  

## Professional Summary

Muhammed Shamveel is a passionate full-stack web developer and freelancer based in Kozhikode, Kerala, India. With expertise in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) and Next.js, he builds modern, scalable, and performant web applications.

## Core Expertise

**Frontend Technologies:**
- React.js
- Next.js
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- GSAP (animations)

**Backend Technologies:**
- Node.js
- Express.js
- MongoDB
- RESTful APIs

**Tools & Services:**
- Git & GitHub
- ImageKit (image optimization)
- Google Tag Manager
- Next.js Image Optimization

## Portfolio Projects

### 1. ShopeBuy E-Commerce Platform
- **Description:** Full-featured e-commerce platform built with Next.js, MongoDB, and Express.js
- **Technologies:** Next.js, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, ImageKit
- **Features:** Product catalog, shopping cart, payment integration, user authentication
- **URL:** https://www.shamveel.dev/projects/shopebuy-ecommerce-platform

### 2. Coding Club Blood Donor Platform
- **Description:** Community-driven blood donor management platform
- **Technologies:** React, Express.js, MongoDB, Node.js
- **Features:** Donor database, request matching, community engagement
- **URL:** https://www.shamveel.dev/projects/codingclub-blood-donor-platform

## Education

- **Degree:** Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
- **Institution:** JDT Islam College, Kozhikode, Kerala
- **Focus:** Software Development, Web Technologies

## Services Offered

- Full-stack web development
- Frontend development (React, Next.js)
- Backend development (Node.js, Express)
- E-commerce solutions
- Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
- Performance optimization
- Freelance development

- Comprehensive schema.org markup
